note: The acceptance SUITE for the holistic lens. `plantedPositives` are reinventions the lens MUST catch; `nearMisses` are lookalikes with different semantics it MUST NOT flag. Every anchor below is asserted line-exact against this tree by holistic-fixture.test.ts, so a fixture edit that moves a symbol fails the suite instead of silently rotting. Scoring a real (model-in-the-loop) lens run against this file is scoreHolisticFixture(); the deterministic tests score synthetic finding sets, because judging a near-miss is a MODEL property the host cannot mechanize.

plantedPositives.why: A local cents→string formatter duplicating the canonical util, and it drops the negative-amount sign the util handles.
A hand-rolled exponential-backoff loop duplicating the canonical retry helper, minus its jitter.
Hand-built request headers bypassing the canonical helper, silently omitting the mandated trace id.

nearMisses.why: Preserves case, dots, and diacritics on purpose — an identity key, not a URL slug. Replacing it with slugify would merge distinct records.
Half-to-even by design, so accumulated report rounding does not bias upward. Same shape, different rule.
Paces a rate-limited queue with a deterministic delay and re-invokes nothing. withRetry cannot express it.
